title: Crumb Transcript Message
description: Single transcript.jsonl line. v0.3.0: 44 kinds (4 system + 11 workflow + 5 dialogue + 6 step + 5 user + 3 handoff + 7 meta + 3 version/fork) × 11 identification/routing/classification fields × 9 from × 13 step. OTel GenAI alias-able via metadata.gen_ai. 5-layer hierarchy (project → session → run → turn → step → event) with run_id/turn_id in metadata.crumb. researcher actor + step.research.video added in v0.3.0 for the multimodal video-evidence path (gemini-sdk binding). See wiki/concepts/bagelcode-system-architecture-v0.1.md §3.

from.description: v0.3.0: 9 actors. engineering-lead split into builder + verifier (v0.1, cross-provider boundary). researcher promoted from inline-read specialist to standalone actor (v0.3.0, multimodal video understanding via gemini-sdk).

kind.description: v0.3.0: 44 kinds (4 system + 11 workflow + 5 dialogue + 6 step + 5 user + 3 handoff + 7 meta + 3 version/fork). +qa.result (deterministic ground truth event emitted by dispatcher, no LLM). +session.forked / version.released / version.refinement (v0.3.0 milestone hierarchy). +step.research.video (per-clip video-evidence event emitted by researcher actor via gemini-sdk).

scores.description: v0.1: D1-D6 source-of-truth matrix. Each dimension carries score + source (verifier-llm | qa-check-effect | reducer-auto) — every dimension reports a single origin. D3/D5 are split: the verifier emits its LLM-judged value with source='verifier-llm' (the `score` is the LLM component only, 0-5); the reducer-auto component is computed separately by computeAutoScores() and combined deterministically at aggregate time via combineDimScore() in src/state/scorer.ts. The combine rule lives in code, not in the verifier — no LLM can inflate a merged number. Legacy 6-dim fields kept as deprecated aliases for v0.1.x transcript replay.

D3.description: observability — verifier emits LLM semantic component (0-5, source='verifier-llm'); reducer computes auto component separately. combineDimScore averages the two for /5 aggregate.

D5.description: intervention — verifier emits LLM quality component (0-5, source='verifier-llm'); reducer computes auto component separately. combineDimScore averages the two for /5 aggregate.

courteval.description: CourtEval (ACL 2025) 4 sub-step msg id refs for audit trail.

audit_violations.description: anti-deception violations: verify_pass_without_exec_zero | verifier_overrode_d2_ground_truth | verifier_overrode_d4_ground_truth | self_bias_risk_same_provider | researcher_video_evidence_missing

harness.description: v0.3.0: which CLI/SDK harness produced this event. Used for cross-provider self-bias detection. gemini-sdk added in v0.3.0 for the researcher actor's video understanding path (gemini-cli has 4 closed/p1-unresolved video bugs, so the SDK is the deterministic route).

provider.description: v0.1: vendor LLM provider. 'none' for deterministic effects.

adapter_session_id.description: v0.1: native session id from host harness (Claude Code uuid / Codex thread_id / Gemini context_id) for cache carry-over. See [[bagelcode-system-architecture-v0.1]] §5.2.2.

cache_carry_over.description: v0.1: signals that next spawn may use --resume <adapter_session_id> for cache hit.

cross_provider.description: v0.1: true when verifier provider differs from builder provider (self-bias risk mitigation, NeurIPS 2024). Set on judge.score events.

deterministic.description: v0.1: true for events emitted by dispatcher effects (qa_check, validator, reducer audit). Cannot be forged by LLM actors.

tool.description: v0.1: tool/effect identifier for deterministic events (e.g., 'qa-check-effect@v1').

evidence_kind.description: v0.3.0: classifies the source of researcher / verifier evidence for D5 anti-deception checks. researcher's step.research.video sets 'video'; planner-internal text-only research path uses 'text'.

cache_key.description: v0.3.0: sha256 of (video_ref + model + prompt_version) for the gemini-sdk adapter's replay cache. The SDK call itself is non-deterministic (model output varies); replay reads the existing transcript event verbatim instead of re-calling the network.

verifier_provider.description: v0.1: use metadata.provider on judge.score events instead.

crumb.description: v0.3.0: 5-layer hierarchy markers (project → session → run → turn → step → event). project lives on the filesystem; session_id and step are top-level fields; run_id/turn_id are reducer-derived and live here. parent_session_id/fork_event_id appear only on the first event of a forked session.

run_id.description: ULID — one coordinator dispatch cycle. Reducer-assigned on goal events; carried forward by subsequent events in the same cycle.

turn_id.description: ULID — one actor activation. Reducer-assigned on agent.wake; carried forward until next agent.wake or handoff.accepted.

parent_session_id.description: Set only on session.forked. Points to the session this fork branches from (no transcript copy — reducer hydrates parent up to fork_event_id on read).

fork_event_id.description: Event ULID in parent_session that this fork branches from.

gen_ai.description: v0.3.0: OpenTelemetry GenAI Semantic Conventions aliases. Allows the OTel exporter to emit standards-compliant attributes without re-deriving them. conversation_id aliases session_id; agent_id aliases from; workflow_name is constant per harness (e.g., 'crumb.coordinator').

conversation_id.description: OTel gen_ai.conversation.id — alias for session_id (OTel spec merges session/conversation/thread).

agent_id.description: OTel gen_ai.agent.id — alias for the from actor.

source.description: Which layer produced this dimension's score. Single origin per dim — the prior 'hybrid' value is removed in favor of split D3/D5 (verifier emits LLM component, reducer computes auto component, combineDimScore() merges deterministically).

evidence.description: AC items / msg ids supporting the score (LLM-derived dimensions).

auto.description: Optional informational mirror of the reducer-auto component for D3/D5 (the canonical value lives in computeAutoScores). Kept for replay convenience; combineDimScore prefers the freshly computed value.

semantic.description: Verifier LLM semantic component for D3.

quality.description: Verifier LLM quality component for D5.
